title: Travel Photo Chibi Sticker Edit AI
sourceTitle: Travel Photo Chibi Sticker Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable social travel photo sticker or handwritten annotation edit with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable social travel photo sticker or handwritten annotation edit built around travel photo chibi sticker edit source photo subject concept 1. signature elements: uploaded travel photo stays unchanged while edge-safe chibi stickers echo the person, outfit, and trip mood layout logic: travel photo chibi sticker edit overlay elements concept 1 should sit near photo edges or open areas, preserving the person, scenery, lighting, and original composition transformation rule: keep the uploaded travel photo unchanged and only add stickers, handwritten notes, arrows, circles, and light decorative marks annotation system: travel photo chibi sticker edit caption style concept 1 controls short social captions and doodles; captions should feel handwritten, casual, and not commercial composition: stable composition, source-image-led edit, original subject and composition remain dominant, overlays stay edge-aware, and spacing avoids blocking the main content. style: Casual social travel-photo edit with cute chibi edge stickers, white sticker outlines, light hearts/stars, and a relaxed life-recording mood. sharing mood: travel photo chibi sticker edit sharing mood concept 1. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition subject: travel photo chibi sticker edit source photo subject concept 1 as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable lighting: preserve the original photo or reference-image lighting; overlays should adapt to it instead of relighting the scene typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
